n: Instance: A King Should See His Kingdom

steps.t: Glindor has brought you to the Tower of Ecthelion, where King Elessar and Queen Arwen await you.
King Elessar is ready to speak with you about his plans.
Thalhír, the Warden of Laws, is in the Tower of Ecthelion and has been called to answer whether the Heirs of Castamir remain a threat to the peace of …
Queen Arwen is in the Tower of Ecthelion and wishes to speak with you about a special task.
King Elessar is in the Tower of Ecthelion, waiting to hear if you will agree to this new plan.
